heading: Research on domestic and international trafficking in persons
label: 7109a Research on domestic and international trafficking in persons

children.text: The economic causes and consequences of trafficking in persons.
The effectiveness of programs and initiatives funded or administered by Federal agencies to prevent trafficking in persons and to protect and assist victims of trafficking.
The interrelationship between trafficking in persons and global health risks, particularly HIV/AIDS.
Subject to subsection (b), the interrelationship between trafficking in persons and terrorism, including the use of profits from trafficking in persons to finance terrorism.

An effective mechanism for quantifying the number of victims of trafficking on a national, regional, and international basis, which shall include, not later than 2 years after , the establishment and maintenance of an integrated database within the Human Smuggling and Trafficking Center.December 23, 2008

The abduction and enslavement of children for use as soldiers, including steps taken to eliminate the abduction and enslavement of children for use as soldiers and recommendations for such further steps as may be necessary to rapidly end the abduction and enslavement of children for use as soldiers.

children.heading: Role of Human Smuggling and Trafficking Center
children.label: b Role of Human Smuggling and Trafficking Center

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The research initiatives described in paragraphs (4) and (5) of subsection (a) shall be carried out by the Human Smuggling and Trafficking Center, established under .section 1777 of title 8

children.label: A
children.text: improve the coordination of the collection of data related to trafficking in persons by each agency of the United States Government that collects such data;

children.label: B
children.text: promote uniformity of such data collection and standards and systems related to such collection;

children.label: C
children.text: undertake a meta-analysis of patterns of trafficking in persons, slavery, and slave-like conditions to develop and analyze global trends in human trafficking;

children.label: D
children.text: identify emerging issues in human trafficking and establishing integrated methods to combat them; and

children.label: E
children.text: identify research priorities to respond to global patterns and emerging issues.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: 3 Consultation
children.text: The database established in accordance with paragraph (2) shall be maintained in consultation with the Director of the Office to Monitor and Combat Trafficking in Persons of the Department of State.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 4 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated $1,000,000 to the Human Smuggling and Trafficking Center for each of the fiscal years 2022 through 2027 to carry out the activities described in this subsection.

children.heading: AIDS
children.label: 1 AIDS
children.text: The term “AIDS” means the acquired immune deficiency syndrome.

children.heading: HIV
children.label: 2 HIV
children.text: The term “HIV” means the human immunodeficiency virus, the pathogen that causes AIDS.

children.heading: HIV/AIDS
children.label: 3 HIV/AIDS
children.text: The term “HIV/AIDS” means, with respect to an individual, an individual who is infected with HIV or living with AIDS.
